{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron stage
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Iron stage]] is a level of [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Iron body]] is a quantitative difference compared to [[Copper]] or below, making [[Irons]] superhuman.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Advancing to [[Iron]] refines the body and expels impurities.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
